## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      3 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jul 3, 2026 - Jul 15, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Colton Capps_, Jul 15, 2026, 1/5: "Any app that limits functionality behind a paywall for basic features gets a 1 star from me. If you just offered bonus features or more benefits, I wouldn’t be upset, but you limit people on the amount of tasks they can create, lists they can make, countdowns they can have, and habits they can track. After a short amount of time using this app, it becomes unusable without forking over money every month. I can’t even check off my repeating tasks now that I have “reached my limit.” Quit being so greedy."
            2. _Wizzard192_, Jul 13, 2026, 1/5: "There is no way to set a time in task completed/restart App is nothing but bugs. Rip off"
            3. _SpiritLoveRoot_, Jul 3, 2026, 5/5: "1. Better repeating task options 2. Better Calendar Views & Integrations 3. Ability to link tasks to each more easily 4. Ability to integrate with Notion more easily 5. Todoist has a nicer UI, is slightly less buggy, and has a slightly nicer quick entry option for tasks 6. But in general, just a lot more little nice power features that make it substantially better than Todoist"
